home.title: The Gridcn | Tron-Inspired shadcn/ui Theme
home.description: A Tron: Ares inspired theme and component library for shadcn/ui. 55+ components, 6 Greek god color themes, 3D effects, and HUD-style UI elements for futuristic React interfaces.

components.title: Components | The Gridcn
components.description: Browse 55+ Tron-inspired UI components for shadcn/ui. Data cards, HUD elements, 3D grids, radar displays, and more — all with Greek god color themes and glow effects.

timeline.title: SC Lore Timeline | The Gridcn
timeline.description: Navigate 879 years of Star Citizen lore history — from humanity's first quantum drive in 2075 SE through the Messer Era tyranny and into the fractured modern UEE of 2954 SE.

templates.title: Templates | The Gridcn
templates.description: Full-page templates built with Tron-inspired components. Dashboard, landing page, blog, analytics — ready to use with shadcn/ui.

hero.title: Build Futuristic UIs on The Grid
hero.subtitle: A Tron-inspired theme and component library for shadcn/ui. Drop-in components with Greek god color schemes, 3D effects, and HUD-style elements.

features.title: CAPABILITIES
features.subtitle: Everything you need to build immersive, futuristic interfaces.

components.title: 55+ Components
components.description: A complete set of Tron-inspired UI components built on shadcn/ui — from data cards and radar displays to 3D grids.

themes.title: 6 God Themes
themes.description: Greek god color schemes: Ares (red), Tron (cyan), Clu (orange), Athena (gold), Aphrodite (pink), Poseidon (blue).

effects.title: 3D Effects
effects.description: Three.js powered 3D grids, tunnel effects, and animated geometry — all client-side optimized.

hud.title: HUD Elements
hud.description: Authentic HUD-style displays: radar, uplink headers, scan overlays, reticle — straight from the Grid.

intensity.title: Intensity Modes
intensity.description: Tune visual effects with none, light, medium, or heavy intensity settings — adapts to any context.

registry.title: shadcn Registry
registry.description: Install any component with a single CLI command. Works with pnpm, npm, yarn, and bun.

what.question: What is The Gridcn?
what.answer: The Gridcn is a Tron-inspired theme and component library built on top of shadcn/ui. It provides 50+ pre-styled components, 6 Greek god color themes, 3D effects powered by Three.js, and HUD-style UI elements — all designed to create immersive, futuristic interfaces with minimal setup.

install.question: How do I install components?
install.answer: Install components using the shadcn CLI: run 'pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add @thegridcn/[component]' for individual components, or 'pnpm dlx shadcn@latest list @thegridcn' to browse all. Works with npm, yarn, and bun.

theme.question: Can I customize the color themes?
theme.answer: Yes — all themes use CSS custom properties with oklch() color space. Override any variable in your globals.css to customize colors, glow intensities, and effects while keeping the design system intact.

existing.question: Does it work with an existing shadcn/ui project?
existing.answer: Absolutely. The Gridcn builds on top of shadcn/ui's primitives. You can add Tron-styled components alongside your existing ones — no conflicts, no breaking changes.

typescript.question: TypeScript support?
typescript.answer: Full TypeScript support with accurate type definitions for all components, theme values, and configuration options.

commercial.question: Is it free for commercial use?
commercial.answer: The Gridcn is open source. All components and themes are free to use in personal and commercial projects.

ssr.question: Does it support SSR?
ssr.answer: Yes. All components work with Next.js App Router and SSR by default. Three.js components use dynamic imports with ssr: false to avoid hydration issues.

updates.question: Will there be updates?
updates.answer: New components, themes, and improvements are actively in development. Watch the GitHub repository for updates.
